title: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
company: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates!
